archetype_reasoning: This trader has extraordinary accuracy in exactly two domains — Trump_US (95.6%, 328W/15L) and Russia_UKR (93.9%, 1008W/66L) — but catastrophically fails outside them with a 9.2% win rate in 'Other' (45W/442L). The 1904 resolved trades and 0.887 directionality confirm focused, conviction-driven positioning within their areas of expertise. The recent Harris drop-out cluster (15 consecutive losses on the same market at contested prices ~0.65-0.74) illustrates the spectacular failure mode when they stray.
domain_blindspots: Other: catastrophic 9.2% accuracy across 487 trades, suggesting systematic misjudgement outside core domains — likely overconfidence spillover
domain_summary: Elite-level edge in Russia/Ukraine and Trump/US markets with near-elite win rates across a large sample. Completely unreliable outside these two domains — the Other category performance (9.2%) is worse than random and represents a significant signal-destroying blind spot.
signal_weight_reasoning: Full weight should apply exclusively to Russia_UKR and Trump_US signals where win rates are battle-tested over hundreds of trades. Outside these domains, this trader's signals should be excluded entirely — a 9.2% accuracy rate in 'Other' is a strong contra-indicator, meaning following their non-core trades is actively harmful. The recent Harris series (15 losses in a row on the same market) reinforces the danger of domain bleed.
discounted_domains: Any market outside Russia_UKR and Trump_US

Concentration risk: 1904 trades across only 4 distinct markets means single-market shocks can dominate outcomes
The 'Other' category 442 losses vs 45 wins implies sustained, repeated exposure to losing bets outside core competence

Watch for further 'Other' category trades which should trigger immediate discount flag
Track whether the Harris loss cluster represents a temporary aberration or the start of a broader performance degradation

summary: This trader is a genuine elite domain specialist with one of the strongest track records on the platform within Russia/Ukraine and Trump/US markets — $8.17M realized PnL and 1904 trades at near-95% domain accuracy cannot be dismissed as luck. However, the catastrophic Other category (9.2% win rate, 442 losses) reveals a dangerous overconfidence spillover when operating outside core competence. The recent Harris cluster — 15 identical losing positions on the same market — is a serious red flag for sunk-cost behaviour and discipline breakdown. Signal weight should be set to DOMAIN_ONLY: copy Russia_UKR and Trump_US trades with conviction, ignore everything else.
